query: How to file a workplace harassment complaint?

candidates.candidate_text: Workplace Harassment Policy: Company has zero tolerance for harassment of any kind. Employees who experience or witness harassment should report immediately to HR or via the confidential hotline (1-800-555-0199). All reports are investigated within 5 business days. Retaliation is strictly prohibited and subject to disciplinary action.

Harassment Complaint Filing SOP: Step 1 — Complete the Incident Report Form (available on HR portal). Step 2 — Submit to HRBP or via confidential hotline. Step 3 — HR assigns investigator within 48 hours. Step 4 — Investigation completed within 10 business days. Step 5 — Outcome communicated to both parties.

FAQ: Workplace Conduct — Q: What qualifies as harassment? A: Unwelcome conduct based on protected characteristics including race, gender, age, religion, or disability. Q: Can I report anonymously? A: Yes, via the confidential hotline. Q: What protections exist for reporters? A: Anti-retaliation policy applies to all good-faith reports.
IT security incident response policy: Procedure for reporting data breaches, phishing attempts, and unauthorized system access. Includes incident classification matrix and escalation contacts.

Chat transcript: Employee told HR about inappropriate comments from coworker. HR advised employee to document incidents and file formal complaint. Employee asked if they could transfer departments instead. HR explained process.
